text: On the weekend I usually relax and go out.
But today I travel. First, I go to the airport.
Passport
Ticket
Suitcase
Gate
Flight
Boarding pass
Check-in
Departures
Can I see your passport, please?
Here is my passport and my ticket.
Here is your boarding pass.
Where is my gate?
Good morning. Welcome to check-in. Can I see your passport and ticket, please?
Good morning. Here is my passport and my ticket.
Thank you. Do you have one suitcase? Please put it here.
Yes, one suitcase. Where is my gate?
Here is your boarding pass. Your gate is twelve. Your flight is at three o'clock.
Thank you very much. Have a good day!
My flight is at three o'clock.
I go to check-in with my suitcase.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the airport. This is a boarding announcement for flight two zero five to London. Passengers, please go to gate fifteen now. Please have your passport and your boarding pass ready. Boarding starts in ten minutes. Please put your suitcase on the line, and keep your ticket in your hand. Thank you, and have a good flight.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Today I am at the airport for my first big trip. I have my passport, my ticket, and one small suitcase. First, I go to check-in. The agent looks at my passport and gives me my boarding pass. Then I look for the gate. My flight leaves from gate twelve. I am a little nervous, but I am very happy. I always check my boarding pass two times. Now I wait at the gate for my flight.

First, Gabriela arrives at the airport with her passport and her ticket. Then she goes to check-in and puts her suitcase on the line. The agent looks at her passport and gives her a boarding pass. After that, she walks to the gate. Finally, she waits at the gate for her flight to London.
